editorial.title: Star ratings get gamed. Source documents don't.
editorial.p1: TrustGive aggregates public registries — IRS Form 990, UK Charity Commission, Минюст СОНКО — and links directly to the source documents. We don't publish a trust score. We don't process payments. The job of the platform is to take you to the original record in one click.

v4.eyebrow: A discovery archive of verified charities
v4.standfirst: The link on every charity card opens its actual regulator filing — Form 990, Charity Commission, Минюст СОНКО, audited annual reports. We don't grade. We cite.

people.standfirst: Health, education, refugees, mental health, anti-trafficking, veterans, LGBTQ+. The bucket is broad on purpose — anywhere humans are the recipients.

planet.standfirst: Climate, conservation, ecosystems, biodiversity, rewilding. The donor is the planet itself, not the people who live on it.

animals.standfirst: Welfare, sanctuaries, wildlife, marine life, advocacy. From legal-action funds to single-species rescues.

people.pageSubtitle: Verified organisations focused on health, poverty, and humanitarian work.

animals.pageSubtitle: Verified organisations focused on animal protection, rescue, and wildlife conservation.

planet.pageSubtitle: Verified organisations focused on climate, conservation, and ecosystems.

donate.microcopy: 0% commission. We never touch your money.

breakdown.unavailable: Program-services breakdown not reported on this Form 990. Many charities outside the U.S. don't itemise these in their filings, and we don't infer what wasn't disclosed.

catalog.title: Charities
catalog.search: Search by name, EIN, or cause
catalog.tryRemoving: Try removing a filter or broadening the cause selection.
catalog.notFoundBody: We couldn't find this charity. The link may be outdated. Browse the full catalog to find a similar organisation.

charity.noFee: 0% platform fee. We never see your money.
charity.staleWarning: Last filing {{date}}. Older than 24 months — review with caution.
charity.leavingBody: Your donation will go directly to {{name}} on their own website. We don't process payments.

methodology.title: How we verify
methodology.lead: We don't grade charities. We show you the documents that grade them for us — and link straight to those documents.
methodology.verifiedMeansBody: A charity is marked Verified on TrustGive if all three are true: (1) it is registered with at least one government registry; (2) it has filed financial documents in the last 24 months; (3) we link directly to those documents on the charity's page.
methodology.doNotVerifyBody: We do not assess program effectiveness, mission outcomes, or donor satisfaction. For deeper rigor, we recommend GiveWell, Effektiv-Spenden, and CharityWatch.
methodology.complianceBody: TrustGive is operated from Russia. Russian law requires us to exclude the following categories of organisations from our catalogue, regardless of the work they do:
methodology.complianceItem1: Organisations recognised as foreign agents by the Ministry of Justice of the Russian Federation
methodology.complianceItem2: Organisations recognised as extremist or undesirable by Russian courts or executive bodies
methodology.complianceItem3: Organisations providing material assistance to parties of active armed conflicts
methodology.complianceItem4: Organisations registered in territories where compliance with Russian regulations cannot be reliably verified
methodology.complianceFooter: These exclusions are a legal compliance requirement, not an editorial judgement about the work these organisations do. Donors who wish to support such organisations can do so directly through other discovery tools.
methodology.deeperBody: For mission-effectiveness analysis, we recommend GiveWell, Effektiv-Spenden, and CharityWatch.

common.errorBody: This is on us, not on the charity. Please try again in a moment.

drawer.previewUnavailable: Government registries don't allow embedded preview. Open the original to read the full filing.
drawer.notEdited: This is the original filing. TrustGive did not edit it.
drawer.howItWorks: TrustGive links straight to the registry — we don't host or modify charity filings.

footer.tagline: Discovery for verified charities. Public-data first. 0% platform fee.
footer.colophon: We don't process donations. We never see your money.
